mac.name: Mac System 1 (1984)
mac.description: Stark black and white, 1px flat borders, bitmap textures, amber gold accent.

next.name: NeXTSTEP (1988)
next.description: Deep black, 2px 3D beveled edges, CRT scanlines, pure grayscale, no chromatic accent.

fonts.note: Same font families in both modes. Only colors change between light and dark.

borders.next: 2px 3D beveled edges (raised: top-left light, bottom-right dark; sunken: inverted)
borders.zeroRadius: No border-radius anywhere in either mode

utilities.mac-dots: Radial gradient dot grid pattern (12px spacing)

animation.pageLoad: Staggered fade-in-up reveals (animate-reveal, animate-reveal-d1 through d8). 0.3s ease-out-quart.
animation.scrollReveal: data-reveal attribute on sections. IntersectionObserver triggers .revealed class. 0.2s ease-out-quart, 4px shift.
animation.terminalTypewriter: data-terminal container with data-line children. Lines appear one by one (baseDelay + i * lineDelay). CSS opacity toggle via .typed class.
animation.crtFlicker: Theme toggle: double-flash white overlay (flash-off-flash-switch-off) over 200ms. Simulates CRT monitor input change.
animation.reducedMotion: Full prefers-reduced-motion support. All animations disabled, terminals show all lines instantly.
